training_set_description: SYNTHETIC weights generated with numpy default_rng(seed=20260703). This is NOT a trained model. It exists so the L4b endpoint can produce deterministic, honest output with a real linear head shape. Real training on TCGA-BRCA is Phase 4 (weeks 9-12 of Wave 3 Moat plan).
AUROC_CAVEAT: This head has n_training=0 REAL slides. AUROC has not been measured and MUST NOT be reported. Do not use this model for any clinical decision. RESEARCH USE ONLY.
